violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the dish machine was observed at 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Call was made for service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment taken out of service and set for proper cleaning and sanitizing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
